title: Update a tool contract and companion docs
prompt: In the AgentLink eval fixture workspace, update the summarize_note tool to support an optional boolean includeTags parameter. Edit only files under fixtures/agent-eval-workspace/work. Update both the tool registry and companion docs, then run the fixture validation command and report what changed.
successCriteria: The tool registry includes optional boolean includeTags.
docs/tools.md documents includeTags in the parameter table.
The final response reports validation and both changed files.
